prerequisites.value: Base attack bonus +3, rage class feature

description.value: **Benefit:** When you spend a swift action to attempt a performance combat check while you’re raging, you gain a +2 bonus on the check if the trigger involved you dealing damage to a creature that had hit you within the last round. Combat Trick Note If using the optional Stamina Pool rules, the following trick may be used with this feat. Combat Trick: You can spend 3 stamina points to increase the bonus on performance combat checks that you gain from Thrilling Vengeance by 2.
